_meta.description: W-Engine database (Lv. 60; refinement rank is a runtime input). The v1 DUMMY engine became the real deep_sea_visitor on 2026-07-14 (same stats; its Ice DMG passive stays note-only so the game-validated DUMMY regression baselines remain exact). More engines are added as a data-only change.
_meta.conventions: advanced_stat uses the same stat names and fraction convention as discs.json (0.24 = 24%). passive_note documents effects the user must enter manually as external buffs. Optional 'refinement' models rank-scaled passives: 'rank' is only the DEFAULT rank - the UI/CLI let the user pick R1..max_rank at runtime. 'passive_dmg_by_rank' entries are ALWAYS-ON DMG% parts ({element, values[max_rank]}), applied automatically when the dealt element matches. 'passive_ap_by_rank' is an ALWAYS-ON flat AP part (Joyau Dore), auto-applied to the equipper in anomaly modes. 'conditional_buff' is a stacking buff (per_stack_by_rank, element-gated) with active stacks asked at runtime; max_stacks 1 = plain on/off (UI checkbox); optional 'bracket' routes it to 'dmg_bonus' (default), 'anomaly_buff' (the separate Anomaly/Disorder Buff Multiplier bracket) or 'sheer_dmg' (the dedicated Sheer DMG bracket), optional 'modes' gates it to calculation modes (direct/anomaly/disorder/vortex/sheer; the element gate is checked in direct/anomaly/sheer modes only), optional 'skill_tags' gates it to hits of those damage types (Qingming Birdcage's Ult/EX part). 'conditional_buffs' (list) models engines whose ONE stack counter drives several parts - all share CalcConfig.engine_buff_stacks. 'passive_crit_by_rank' is an ALWAYS-ON CRIT Rate part (Qingming Birdcage), auto-applied to the equipper in crit-capable modes. 'squad_buffs' kinds match the agent-kit effect kinds (crit_dmg, atk_pct, anomaly_proficiency, hp_pct, ...).

deep_sea_visitor.name: Deep Sea Visitor (R1)
deep_sea_visitor.passive_note: Ellen's signature (the former dummy_engine renamed 2026-07-14 - same stats, so every DUMMY-era game validation still holds). Lord of Seas R1: Ice DMG +25% (to +50% R5); Basic hit: CRIT Rate +10% for 8s; Ice-dealing Dash hit: a further +10% for 15s. NOT auto-applied (kept manual so the validated baselines stay exact): enter Ice DMG% as external DMG bonus and the CRIT parts as external CRIT Rate when active. Datamine wengine params [0.25, 0.1, 8, 0.1, 15] at R1.

severed_innocence.name: Severed Innocence

conditional_buff.name: Tranquil Blossom (3 stacks): Electric DMG
conditional_buff.note: At all 3 Tranquil Blossom stacks: the equipper's Electric DMG +20% (R1). Anby S maintains 3 stacks trivially (Basic/Special/Aftershock hits grant them) - RAMP-UP, auto-applied. Enter 1 (= at 3 stacks) or 0.

severed_innocence.passive_note: Anby S's signature (added 2026-07-15, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.3, 1, 0.1, 3, 30, 3, 0.2] at R1). Advanced stat CRIT DMG 48% (0.192 x 2.5 at Lv. 60). CRIT DMG parts NOT auto-applied (no crit bracket in the engine conditional system): base +30% (R1) / +48% (R5) unconditional, plus +10% (R1) / +16% (R5) per Tranquil Blossom stack (max 3, effectively always full) - enter the total as external CRIT DMG (R1 full stacks: 30 + 30 = 60; R5: 48 + 48 = 96). The Electric +20% at 3 stacks IS modeled (auto conditional buff).

spectral_gaze.name: Spectral Gaze

squad_buffs.name: Wind Seeker: enemy DEF reduction
squad_buffs.note: When the equipper's Aftershock deals Electric DMG: the target's DEF -25% (R1) to -40% (R5) for 5s - near-permanent in Trigger's off-field loop, so RAMP-UP, auto-applied. Enemy debuff: benefits the whole squad's direct/anomaly hits (Sheer damage ignores DEF anyway). Only one instance per squad.

spectral_gaze.passive_note: Trigger's signature (added 2026-07-15, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.25, 5, 1, 3, 0.04, 12, 0.08] at R1). Advanced stat CRIT Rate 24% (feeds her ability's CRIT->Daze conversion - buildup only). The Spirit Lock Impact stacks (+4%/stack x3, +8% at full, off-field) affect Daze buildup only - not modeled. The DEF shred IS modeled (squad buff, auto).

cordis_germina.name: Cordis Germina

conditional_buff.name: Sprouting Core: Electric DMG
conditional_buff.note: Basic / EX Special hits grant a stack (40s each, once per skill): Electric DMG +12.5% (R1) per stack, max 2 (+25% R1 / +40% R5) - trivially maintained by Seed, RAMP-UP, auto-applied at max.

cordis_germina.passive_note: Seed's signature (added 2026-07-15, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.15, 1, 0.125, 2, 40, 2, 0.2] at R1). Advanced stat CRIT Rate 24%; the passive's unconditional CRIT Rate +15% (R1) to +23% (R5) is auto-applied via passive_crit_by_rank. NOT modeled: at 2 stacks her Basic and Ultimate DMG ignore 20% (R1) to 32% (R5) of enemy DEF (no equipper-side DEF-ignore bracket in the engine system yet) - PROVISIONAL: account for it externally when comparing builds (roughly +10-14% damage vs a Lv. 60 boss at 20%).

sol_exuvia.name: Sol Exuvia
sol_exuvia.passive_note: Pyrois' signature, free with the Season 3 story (added 2026-07-15, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.2, 0.16, 45] at R1). Advanced stat ATK% 30 (0.12 x 2.5 at Lv. 60); the passive's CRIT Rate +20% is unconditional AND rank-independent - auto-applied via passive_crit_by_rank. NOT modeled: the Eclipse effect (granted on entering combat, refreshed by his Ultimates, 45s - effectively permanent on Pyrois): his DMG ignores 16% (R1) to 22% (R5) of ETHER RES - enter as external RES shred (no equipper-side engine RES bracket yet).

the_vault.name: The Vault

squad_buffs.name: Money-Lover: target DMG taken
squad_buffs.note: When the equipper deals Ether DMG with an EX Special / Chain / Ultimate: ALL units' DMG against the target +15% (R1) to +24% (R5) for 2s - Nicole re-applies it continuously through her EX spam, effectively up in her buff windows (same window as her core debuff), so auto-applied. Only one instance per squad. Modeled in the ordinary DMG% bracket (datamine common_dmg_).

the_vault.passive_note: Nicole's signature (A-RANK support engine, added 2026-07-15, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.15, 0.5, 2] at R1; atk_base 42 -> Lv. 60 base 624, Energy Regen 20% x 2.5 = 50%). A-rank engines are commonly owned at R5. The equipper Energy Regen +0.5/s part is resource-only.

hellfire_gears.name: Hellfire Gears
hellfire_gears.passive_note: Koleda's signature, assigned as Nangong Yu's DEFAULT engine (user choice 2026-07-15; zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.6, 0.1, 10, 2] at R1; atk_base 46 -> Lv. 60 base 684, Impact% 7.2 x 2.5 = 18). Passive 'Passionate Construction' has NO damage-formula effect: off-field Energy Regen +0.6/s (R1) to +1.2/s (R5) is resource-only, and the EX Special Impact +10%/stack x2 (R1; 20% R5) affects Daze buildup only - nothing to model or enter.

the_restrained.name: The Restrained

conditional_buff.name: Binding Chains: Basic Attack DMG
conditional_buff.note: On-hit stacks (one per skill use, 8s each, tracked separately): the equipper's BASIC ATTACK DMG +6% per stack at R1 (max +30%; +60% at R5). Applies only when the calculated hit is a Basic Attack. The matching Daze half affects buildup only.

the_restrained.passive_note: Lycaon's signature (added 2026-07-14, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.06, 8, 5] at R1; atk_base 46 -> Lv. 60 base 684, Impact% 7.2 x 2.5 = 18). Impact% affects Daze buildup only - tracked, not damage. Only the Basic-DMG half of Binding Chains is damage-relevant (modeled as the conditional buff).

kaboom_the_cannon.name: Kaboom the Cannon

squad_buffs.name: Stampede Accident: squad ATK%
squad_buffs.note: When any friendly unit hits an enemy: ALL friendly units' ATK +2.5% (R1) per stack for 8s, max 4 stacks (+10% R1 / +16% R5; each unit incl. Bangboo provides one stack, durations separate). Trivially maintained in any rotation - RAMP-UP, auto-applied at max stacks. Joins the combat ATK% bracket.

kaboom_the_cannon.passive_note: Lucy's default (A-RANK support engine, added 2026-07-14, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.025, 8, 4, 1] at R1; atk_base 42 -> Lv. 60 base 624, Energy Regen 20% x 2.5 = 50%). Energy Regen is resource-only, tracked but not damage. A-rank engines are commonly owned at R5 (values modeled R1-R5). Only one instance of the squad buff can exist per squad.

steel_cushion.name: Steel Cushion

passive_dmg_by_rank.note: Metal Cat Claws: Physical DMG increase, always active while equipped.

conditional_buff.name: Metal Cat Claws (back attack)
conditional_buff.note: Equipper's DMG increases when hitting the enemy from behind. Nekomata M1: while the enemy is Stunned, all her attacks count as back attacks.

steel_cushion.passive_note: Both passive parts are modeled: Physical DMG% applies automatically at the selected rank; toggle the back-attack bonus when the hit lands from behind. Verified 2026-07-02 (Game8/zzz.gg): Lv.60 base ATK 684, CRIT Rate 24%.

half_sugar_bunny.name: Half-Sugar Bunny

squad_buffs.name: Fragile Sweetness: squad ATK%
squad_buffs.note: All squad members' ATK% (unique to the squad). CONFIRMED in-game 2026-07-03 (validation #4): panel-multiplying, sharing ONE additive bracket with Combat ATK% set effects (both apply to the unbuffed panel).

squad_buffs.name: Fragile Sweetness: squad CRIT DMG (Ether Veil)
squad_buffs.note: When the equipper activates/extends an Ether Veil: squad CRIT DMG for 60s.

half_sugar_bunny.passive_note: Zhao's signature (verified 2026-07-03, Game8). Squad Max HP% and Energy Regen parts are not modeled (no damage effect). Squad buffs apply via the Team card when a support wears it.

yesterday_calls.name: Yesterday Calls

squad_buffs.name: Yesterday Calls: squad CRIT DMG (3 Daze stacks)
squad_buffs.note: At 3 stacks of the equipper's EX-Special Daze buff: squad CRIT DMG for 40s. R1 30% / R5 48% verified (Game8); R2-R4 interpolated on the standard refinement progression.

yesterday_calls.passive_note: Dialyn's signature (verified 2026-07-03, Game8). Off-field Energy Regen and the Daze +9-14.5%/stack parts affect buildup only, not proc damage - not modeled.

sharpened_stinger.name: Sharpened Stinger (R2)

conditional_buff.name: Predatory Instinct
conditional_buff.note: Dash attacks grant stacks; 3 stacks are granted instantly on entering combat or perfect dodge - RAMP-UP, effectively always max, so auto-applied at max stacks (the anomaly range's floor covers uptime).

sharpened_stinger.passive_note: Anomaly Buildup +40% (R1) to +80% (R5) at max stacks affects buildup speed only, not proc damage. The Physical DMG% stacks are modeled via the refinement system (stacks asked at runtime).

heartstring_nocturne.name: Heartstring Nocturne (R1)
heartstring_nocturne.passive_note: R1 passive (CRIT DMG +50%; Heartstring stacks ignore part of enemy Fire RES) is NOT auto-applied; enter as external CRIT DMG / RES shred when active.

elegant_vanity.name: Elegant Vanity

squad_buffs.name: Untold Beauty: squad DMG
squad_buffs.note: When the equipper consumes 25+ Energy: ALL squad members' DMG +10% (R1) per stack, max 2 stacks (+20% at R1), 20s, refreshed on repeat - Astra's Tremolos consume 25 Energy each, so RAMP-UP, effectively always at max: auto-applied at 2 stacks.

elegant_vanity.passive_note: Astra Yao's signature (added 2026-07-14, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [5, 5, 25, 0.10, 2, 20] at R1). Advanced stat ATK% 30 (0.12 x 2.5 at Lv. 60) - raises her Tremolo flat-ATK buff via her panel ATK. The 5-Energy-on-switch-in part (once/5s) is resource only - not modeled. Only one instance of the squad buff can exist per squad.

blazing_laurel.name: Blazing Laurel

squad_buffs.name: Wilt: Ice/Fire CRIT DMG
squad_buffs.note: The equipper's Basic Attack hits apply Wilt (max 20 stacks, 30s): any squad member's ICE and FIRE damage gains +1.5% CRIT DMG per stack (R1; +30% at max stacks). ONLY Ice/Fire DMG - the squad-buff system has no element gate, so check this only when the on-field attacker deals Ice or Fire damage (Lighter teams normally do). Enter the realistic stack count (Lighter's Morale Burst combos stack it fast).

blazing_laurel.passive_note: Lighter's signature (added 2026-07-14, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.25, 8, 30, 20, 0.015] at R1). Advanced stat Impact% 18 (0.072 x 2.5 at Lv. 60) - Impact affects Daze buildup only, tracked but not damage. The Impact +25% for 8s on Quick/Perfect Assist is buildup only - not modeled. Only one instance of the Wilt buff can exist per squad.

chief_sidekick.name: Chief Sidekick

squad_buffs.name: The Genius's Follower: squad DMG
squad_buffs.note: When the equipper deals Fire DMG with an EX Special Attack: ALL Agents' DMG +12.5% (R1) per stack, max 2 stacks (+25% at R1), 30s, refreshed on repeat (once per skill) - Norma's EX/turrets fire constantly, so RAMP-UP, effectively always at max: auto-applied at 2 stacks.

chief_sidekick.passive_note: Norma's signature (added 2026-07-14, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [30, 0.15, 0.4, 0.125, 30, 2] at R1). Advanced stat CRIT Rate 24% (0.096 x 2.5 at Lv. 60) - feeds her core CRIT->CRIT DMG conversion. NOT auto-applied: the equipper's own DMG ignores 15% (R1) - 24% (R5) of the target's FIRE RES - enter as external RES shred when NORMA is the attacker dealing Fire damage. Impact +30 flat and off-field Energy Regen +0.4/s affect buildup/resources only. Only one instance of the squad buff can exist per squad.

timeweaver.name: Timeweaver

conditional_buff.name: Timeweaver: Disorder DMG (AP >= 375)
conditional_buff.note: When the equipper's AP >= 375: Disorder DMG +25% (R1) - Yanagi easily clears 375, so RAMP-UP, auto-applied. Anomaly/Disorder Buff Multiplier bracket (PROVISIONAL).

timeweaver.passive_note: Yanagi's signature (completed 2026-07-04, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.3, 75, 15, 375, 0.25] at R1). Advanced stat ATK% 30 (0.12 x 2.5 at Lv.60 - confirmed). The AP +75..115 (on Special/EX vs an anomalous enemy, 15s) is effectively always up in her rotation, so modeled as ALWAYS-ON passive_ap (auto in anomaly modes). Electric Anomaly Buildup +30% affects buildup speed only - not modeled.

flight_of_fancy.name: Flight of Fancy
flight_of_fancy.passive_note: Vivian's signature (completed 2026-07-04, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.4, 20, 5, 6, 0.5] at R1). Advanced stat AP 90 (36 x 2.5 at Lv.60). The stacking AP +20/stack x 6 = +120 (R1) on Ether damage is effectively always max for Vivian, so modeled as ALWAYS-ON passive_ap (auto in anomaly modes) - on top of the 90 advanced stat. Anomaly Buildup +40% affects buildup speed only - not modeled.

weeping_cradle.name: Weeping Cradle

squad_buffs.name: Weeping Cradle: target DMG taken (ramp)
squad_buffs.note: The equipper's attacks make ALL units deal +10% DMG to the struck target (R1), ramping +1.7%/0.5s to +10.2% extra = +20.2% total at max. RAMP-UP, auto-applied at the max value. Modeled in the 'DMG taken' bracket.

weeping_cradle.passive_note: Rina's signature (added 2026-07-04, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.6, 0.1, 3, 0.017, 0.5, 0.102] at R1; base ATK corrected 713 -> 684 on 2026-07-14: datamine atk_base 46, same curve as Steel Cushion's verified 684 - only matters if Rina herself attacks). Advanced stat PEN Ratio 24% (0.096 x 2.5 at Lv.60). Off-field Energy Regen +0.6/s not modeled. The target-DMG-taken debuff is squad-facing (applies to the on-field DPS's damage) - toggled via the support's engine buffs.

joyau_dore.name: Joyau Dore

conditional_buff.name: Gilded Gale (Vortex/Windswept DMG)
conditional_buff.note: When the equipper's EX Special deals Wind DMG: Vortex and Windswept DMG +7%/stack (R1) for 40s, up to 2 stacks - RAMP-UP, effectively always max, so auto-applied at max. Joins the Anomaly/Disorder Buff Multiplier bracket (PROVISIONAL).

squad_buffs.name: Joyau Dore: squad Anomaly Proficiency (2 stacks)
squad_buffs.note: At 2 stacks of the equipper's Vortex/Windswept buff: ALL squad members' AP +60 (R1) for 40s (reaches the wearer too). Anomaly modes only. RAMP-UP - auto-applied at max.

joyau_dore.passive_note: Velina's signature (completed 2026-07-03: zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [70, 0.07, 40, 2, 2, 60] at R1). The equipper's AP +70..110 is ALWAYS-ON and auto-applied at the selected rank in anomaly modes; the Vortex/Windswept DMG stacks are the modeled conditional buff; the squad AP +60..96 at 2 stacks is a squad buff that reaches the WEARER too (squad buffs are squad-wide) - toggle it via the on-field engine squad-buff control (or SupportConfig.engine_buffs when a teammate wears it). CONFIRMED needed in-game 2026-07-04 (calibration #5: Velina's AP was 60 short without it). Advanced stat Energy Regen +60% feeds her core passive scaling (enter panel ER as 'initial_energy_regen').

qingming_birdcage.name: Qingming Birdcage

conditional_buffs.name: Qingming Companion: Ether DMG
conditional_buffs.note: Per Qingming Companion stack: Ether DMG +8% (R1). 2 stacks are granted on entering combat and refresh on EX Special - RAMP-UP, effectively always max, so auto-applied at 2.

conditional_buffs.name: Qingming Companion: Ult/EX Sheer DMG
conditional_buffs.note: Per stack: the Ether Sheer DMG of Ultimates and EX Specials +10% (R1) - dedicated Sheer DMG bracket, applies when the calculated hit carries those tags. Shares the same 2-stack counter as the Ether DMG part.

qingming_birdcage.passive_note: Yixuan's signature (added 2026-07-10, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.2, 1, 2, 15, 2, 0.08, 0.1] at R1). Lv.60 base ATK 743, advanced stat HP% 30 (0.12 x 2.5). The always-on CRIT Rate +20% (R1) is modeled as passive_crit (rupture-specialty wearer). Both Qingming Companion parts share one 2-stack counter (auto at max). PROVISIONAL until Sheer calibration.

ice_jade_teapot.name: Ice-Jade Teapot

squad_buffs.name: Tea-riffic: squad DMG (15+ stacks)
squad_buffs.note: At 15+ stacks of the equipper's Tea-riffic (basics grant 1/hit, 30 max): ALL squad members' DMG +20% (R1) for 10s - RAMP-UP in Qingyi's basic-heavy loop, auto-applied.

ice_jade_teapot.passive_note: Qingyi's signature (added 2026-07-10, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [1, 0.007, 30, 8, 15, 0.2, 10] at R1). Advanced stat Impact 18% (0.072 x 2.5). The self Impact +0.7%/stack (R1, 30 stacks = +21%) raises her panel Impact - include it in the 'impact' input of her Additional Ability (Impact -> ATK); it has no direct damage-formula term of its own.

dreamlit_hearth.name: Dreamlit Hearth

squad_buffs.name: Dreamlit Hearth: squad DMG (Ether Veil)
squad_buffs.note: While the equipper's Ether Veil is active: ALL squad members' DMG +25% (R1) for 45s - effectively always up in Lucia's loop, auto-applied.

squad_buffs.name: Dreamlit Hearth: squad Max HP (Ether Veil)
squad_buffs.note: While the Ether Veil is active: ALL squad members' Max HP +15% (R1) - combat HP bracket; feeds Yixuan's HP -> Sheer Force conversion.

dreamlit_hearth.passive_note: Lucia's signature (added 2026-07-10, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.4, 0.25, 0.15, 45] at R1). Advanced stat HP% 30. In the DB for users who own it - Lucia's DEFAULT in this project is Unfettered Game Ball (user decision). Off-field Energy Regen +0.4/s not modeled.

unfettered_game_ball.name: Unfettered Game Ball

squad_buffs.name: Attribute Counter: squad CRIT Rate
squad_buffs.note: In-game text (user-provided 2026-07-10): 'Whenever the equipper's attack triggers an Attribute Counter effect, all squad members' CRIT Rate against the struck enemy increases by 12/13.5/15.5/17.5/20% for 12s. The bonuses triggered by the same type of passive effects do not stack.' SQUAD-WIDE on-enemy effect - it effectively lowers the CRIT Rate the on-field DPS needs to always crit (e.g. R5: 80% panel CR = guaranteed crits; the calculator caps total CR at 100% as usual). Same-name effects from a second copy don't stack - apply it once.

unfettered_game_ball.passive_note: A-rank support engine, Lucia's DEFAULT in this project (user decision - Battle Pass engine). Added 2026-07-10 (zenless-optimizer datamine, params [0.12, 12] at R1; values confirmed against the in-game description 2026-07-10 - the datamine sheet had it equipper-only, corrected to SQUAD-wide per the real text; Lv.60 base ATK 594 = 40 x the S-rank 713/48 curve - verify in-game). Toggle it via Lucia's support engine buffs (or the on-field engine squad-buff control if she is the attacker - squad buffs reach the wearer too). Advanced stat Energy Regen 50% (0.2 x 2.5) feeds her uptime only - not a damage term.

metanukimorphosis.name: Metanukimorphosis

squad_buffs.name: Exquisite Ingenuity: squad Anomaly Proficiency
squad_buffs.note: When the equipper's Aftershock hits an enemy: ALL squad members' AP +60 (R1) for 40s (one instance per squad). Anomaly modes only. Yuzuha's Hard Candy Shot basics are Aftershocks - RAMP-UP, effectively always up, so auto-applied.

metanukimorphosis.passive_note: Yuzuha's signature (added 2026-07-03: Game8 + zenless-optimizer datamine, params [30, 40, 60, 40] at R1). The self Anomaly Mastery +30..48 (40s, on her Physical EX Special/Ultimate) is NOT auto-applied - AM only matters through HER AM-scaled Additional Ability: include it in the 'anomaly_mastery' input you enter for that team buff. Advanced stat Energy Regen +60% at Lv. 60.

tusks_of_fury.name: Tusks of Fury

squad_buffs.name: Invincible Rider: squad DMG
squad_buffs.note: When ANY squad member triggers an Interrupt or Perfect Dodge: ALL squad members' DMG +18% (R1) to +36% (R5) for 20s. With Caesar's parry/block playstyle (Perfect Block, Retaliation, Defensive Assist all count as Interrupts) this is near-permanent - RAMP-UP, auto-applied. Same-name passives do not stack (one per squad). The matching Daze dealt +12%..24% is Daze BUILDUP only - not modeled.

tusks_of_fury.passive_note: Caesar's signature (added 2026-07-15, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.3, 0.18, 0.12, 20] at R1; atk_base 48 -> Lv. 60 base 713, Impact% 7.2 x 2.5 = 18). Impact% affects Daze buildup and Caesar's shield size (300..1400% of base Impact) - tracked, not damage. The Shield-value +30% (R1) to +60% (R5) part is defense-only, note-only. Only the squad DMG% half of Invincible Rider is damage-relevant (modeled as the squad buff, auto).

box_cutter.name: Box Cutter

conditional_buff.name: Watch Your Fingers: Physical DMG
conditional_buff.note: Upon launching an Aftershock: the equipper's Physical DMG +15% (R1) to +24% (R5) for 10s. Pulchra's Nightmare Shadow specials ARE Aftershocks, so this is near-permanent in her loop - RAMP-UP, auto-applied. Buffs ALL her Physical hits during the window (element-gated, no skill-tag gate). The matching Daze +10%..16% is Daze BUILDUP only - not modeled.

box_cutter.passive_note: Pulchra's signature, A-RANK (added 2026-07-15, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.15, 0.1, 10] at R1; atk_base 42 -> Lv. 60 base 624, Impact% 6 x 2.5 = 15). Impact% affects Daze buildup only - tracked, not damage. Only the Physical DMG% half of Watch Your Fingers is damage-relevant (modeled as the conditional buff).

starlight_rider_faceplate.name: Starlight Rider Faceplate

conditional_buffs.name: Knight's Morale: Physical Sheer DMG
conditional_buffs.note: Per stack (granted on launching a Special Attack, 30s, refreshed): the equipper's Physical Sheer DMG +10% (R1) to +16% (R5), max 2 stacks. Starlight Billy's loop is built on Drive Suppression / Cool Wheelie specials - effectively always at max, RAMP-UP, auto-applied at 2. Dedicated Sheer DMG bracket, element-gated to Physical (all of his damage).

starlight_rider_faceplate.passive_note: Starlight Billy's signature (added 2026-07-15, zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [0.2, 0.1, 2, 30] at R1; atk_base 48 -> Lv. 60 base 713, HP% 12 x 2.5 = 30). HP% feeds his HP -> Sheer Force conversion (0.1 SF per Max HP) - very valuable on him. The always-on CRIT Rate +20% (R1) to +32% (R5) is modeled as passive_crit (crit-capable modes). PROVISIONAL until Sheer calibration.
